name: ABS-CBN Holdings Corporation
summary: ABS-CBN Holdings Corporation provides Philippine depository receipts (PDRs) relating to ABS-CBN Corporation in the Philippines. The company also engages in the performance of obligations under the PDRs; and acquisition and holding of shares of ABS-CBN in respect of PDRs issued. The company was formerly known as Worldtech Holdings Corporation and changed its name to ABS-CBN Holdings Corporation in September 1999. ABS-CBN Holdings Corporation was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Mandaluyong, the Philippines. ABS-CBN Holdings Corporation is a subsidiary of Lopez, Inc.
